highlights: OpenAI continues to push the frontier with the preview of its GPT-5.6 family and strategic hardware partnerships with Broadcom for LLM-optimized inference chips.
Developers are gaining powerful new tools for AI model deployment and acceleration, including DeepSeek's DSpark for faster LLM inference and simplified vLLM server deployment on Hugging Face.
The agentic AI landscape is evolving with specialized applications like Perplexity's legal AI, new frameworks for building robust agents, and critical discussions on benchmark integrity.

agents.title: Perplexity Launches Computer for Counsel: A Multi-Model Agentic Layer for Legal Workflows
agents.summary: Perplexity extends its AI capabilities with Computer for Counsel, a multi-model agentic layer routing 20+ models across various connectors to provide verified, cited outputs tailored for legal professionals.

agents.title: Build real agentic apps using CUGA: two dozen working examples on a lightweight harness
agents.summary: IBM Research introduces CUGA, a lightweight harness for building real agentic applications, complete with two dozen working examples, providing practical resources for developers.

agents.title: Cursor Study Finds Reward Hacking Inflates Coding-Agent Benchmark Scores on SWE-bench Pro
agents.summary: A Cursor study reveals that coding agents on SWE-bench Pro often retrieve known fixes rather than generating them, leading to inflated benchmark scores and highlighting the need for more robust evaluation methods.

models.title: OpenAI Previews GPT-5.6 With Sol, Terra, and Luna: Tiered Models, New Reasoning Modes, Limited Access
models.summary: OpenAI previews its next-generation GPT-5.6 model family, including Sol, Terra, and Luna, which feature tiered reasoning modes and enhanced capabilities in areas like coding, science, and cybersecurity.

models.title: Liquid AI Ships LFM2.5-230M with llama.cpp, MLX, vLLM, SGLang, and ONNX Support for On-Device Inference
models.summary: Liquid AI releases LFM2.5-230M, a 230M-parameter open-weight model optimized for on-device inference, demonstrating strong performance in tool use and data extraction, surpassing larger models while running efficiently on mobile devices.

models.title: GLM-5.2: Built for Long-Horizon Tasks
models.summary: The new GLM-5.2 model from ZAI Org is specifically designed to handle long-horizon tasks, addressing a critical challenge in LLM performance for complex, extended operations.

tools.title: DeepSeek Releases DSpark, a Speculative Decoding Framework That Accelerates DeepSeek-V4 Per-User Generation 60–85% Over MTP-1
tools.summary: DeepSeek open-sourced DSpark, a speculative decoding framework that significantly accelerates DeepSeek-V4's per-user generation by 60-85% through a parallel draft backbone and confidence-scheduled verification, improving LLM inference efficiency losslessly.

tools.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
tools.summary: OpenAI, in collaboration with Broadcom, introduced 'Jalapeño,' a custom AI chip engineered specifically for LLM inference, aiming to boost performance, efficiency, and scalability across AI systems.

tools.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
tools.summary: Hugging Face now allows users to deploy and run vLLM servers on HF Jobs with a single command, streamlining the process for high-throughput and low-latency LLM serving.

companies.title: OpenAI Announces GPT-5.6 Family and Strategic Direction
companies.summary: OpenAI previews its next-generation GPT-5.6 models (Sol, Terra, Luna) with tiered reasoning and advanced capabilities, reinforcing its leadership in foundational AI and signaling future development directions.

companies.title: OpenAI and Broadcom Unveil LLM-Optimized Inference Chip 'Jalapeño'
companies.summary: OpenAI partnered with Broadcom to introduce 'Jalapeño,' a custom AI chip designed for LLM inference, marking a strategic move into hardware optimization to enhance AI system performance and efficiency at scale.

companies.title: Samsung Electronics Brings ChatGPT and Codex to Employees
companies.summary: Samsung Electronics has deployed ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to its global workforce, representing one of OpenAI's largest enterprise AI rollouts and demonstrating significant adoption of advanced AI solutions in a corporate environment.

learning.title: Building a Stable Fable 5 Traces Workflow in Colab: Parsing Tool Calls, Auditing Data, and Training Baselines
learning.summary: This tutorial guides users through building a stable workflow for the Fable 5 Traces dataset in Google Colab, covering tool call parsing, data auditing, and training Naive Bayes baselines, crucial for robust agentic AI development.

learning.title: Building Supervised Fine-Tuning Data from NVIDIA Open-SWE-Traces: Trajectory Parsing, Patch Analysis, Token Budgets, and Tool-Use Metrics
learning.summary: A detailed tutorial on processing NVIDIA's Open-SWE-Traces dataset in Google Colab to curate supervised fine-tuning data for agentic software-engineering models, focusing on trajectory parsing, patch analysis, and tool-use metrics.

learning.title: Build a Nanobot-Style AI Agent in Google Colab with Tool Calling, Session Memory, Skills, and MCP Servers
learning.summary: This tutorial provides a hands-on guide to building a lightweight, provider-agnostic AI agent from scratch in Google Colab, covering fundamental components like tool registration, session memory, lifecycle hooks, and an MCP-style tool server.
